2605.00620.title: SC-Taxo: Hierarchical Taxonomy Generation under Semantic Consistency Constraints using Large Language Models
2605.00620.paper_summary: Scientific literature is expanding at an unprecedented pace, making it increasingly challenging to efficiently organize and access domain knowledge. A high-quality scientific taxonomy offers a structured and hierarchical representation of a research field, facilitating literature exploration and topic navigation, as well as enabling downstream applications such as trend analysis, idea generation, and information retrieval. However, existing taxonomy generation approaches often suffer from structural inconsistencies and semantic misalignment across hierarchical levels. Through empirical analysis, we find that these issues largely stem from inadequate modeling of hierarchical semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose a semantic-consistent taxonomy generation (SC-Taxo) framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) with hierarchy-aware refinement stages to ensure semantic consistency. Specifically, SC-Taxo introduces a bidirectional heading generation mechanism that jointly performs bottom-up abstraction and top-down semantic constraint, while further capturing peer-level semantic dependencies to enhance horizontal consistency. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in hierarchy alignment and heading quality, and additional evaluation on Chinese scientific literature validates its robust cross-lingual generalization.
2605.00620.paper_summary_zh: 科學文獻以空前的速度擴展，使得有效組織和訪問領域知識變得越來越具挑戰性。高品質的科學分類法提供了研究領域的結構化和分層表示，促進文獻探索和主題導航，並使得下游應用如趨勢分析、創意生成和信息檢索成為可能。然而，現有的分類法生成方法往往存在結構不一致和層級間語義不對齊的問題。通過實證分析，我們發現這些問題主要源於對層級語義一致性建模的不充分。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了一個語義一致的分類法生成（SC-Taxo）框架，該框架利用大型語言模型（LLMs）並結合層級感知的精煉階段，以確保語義一致性。具體而言，SC-Taxo 引入了一種雙向標題生成機制，該機制同時執行自下而上的抽象和自上而下的語義約束，同時進一步捕捉同級語義依賴，以增強橫向一致性。在多個基準數據集上的實驗顯示了層級對齊和標題質量的一致性改善，並對中國科學文獻的額外評估驗證了其強大的跨語言泛化能力。
2605.00620.author: Shiqiang Cai et.al.
2605.00620.authors: Shiqiang Cai, Nianhong Niu, Shizhu He, Kang Liu, Jun Zhao
